accounts:
  groups: null
  users: null
dnf: {}
fips: {}
ignition: null
installer:
  anaconda:
    kickstart: |
      %post

      echo "=== Custom user kickstart ==="

      echo -e "%sudo\tALL=(ALL)\tNOPASSWD: ALL" > "/etc/sudoers.d/%sudo"
      chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/%sudo
      echo -e "%wheel\tALL=(ALL)\tNOPASSWD: ALL" > "/etc/sudoers.d/%wheel"
      chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/%wheel
      restorecon -rvF /etc/sudoers.d
      %end
  coreos: {}
kernel: {}
locale:
  keyboards:
  - uk
  languages:
  - en_GB.UTF-8
network:
  firewall: {}
openscap:
  profile_id: ""
registration:
  fdo:
    manufacturing_server_url: ""
  redhat:
    connector:
      enabled: false
    insights:
      enabled: false
    subscription_manager: {}
storage:
  partitions: null
  type: ""
systemd: {}
timedate:
  timezone: Europe/Berlin
